channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: USDA Digital Service continuous learning, recruitment partnerships yield promising results
item.description: USDA's Digital Service partners with internal and external organizations to foster technology skills across the department through education and recruitment. The post USDA Digital Service continuous learning, recruitment partnerships yield promising results first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok in a few short months, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Public cloud providers are fumbling the AI opportunity
item.description: Generative AI is exploding and will continue to do so. As such, both on-premises and public cloud providers have seen a boom in demand for their AI wares, which will likely continue for at least the next five years. Cloud is, of course, a core benefit of companies’ intererest in AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Michigan Democrats move to protect reproductive health data before GOP takes control of House
item.description: Democrats in Michigan are pressing to pass reproductive health care legislation before the party loses its majority with the new legislative session next year.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Volmert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TSMC and Nvidia in talks to make AI chips in Arizona, sources reveal
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co is in discussions with Nvidia Corp to produce its Blackwell artificial intelligence chips at the contract manufacturer’s new plant in Arizona, three sources familiar with the matter said.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: How the world can tackle the power demands of artificial intelligence
item.description: The world must reshape its technology infrastructure to ensure artificial intelligence makes good on its potential as a transformative moment in digital innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apex the $45M stegosaurus is on display in New York. Here's what scientists hope to learn about it
item.description: The most expensive dinosaur fossil ever discovered will be on view in New York starting this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI glasses to help dementia patients aims to launch next year
item.description: “It’s continuously watching your visual environment and giving you assistance,” CareYaya CEO Neal Shah said.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Joby Aviation Achieves Milestones in Pilot Training and Safety Management
item.description: Joby Aviation receives Part 141 certificate for pilot training and Part 5 air operations voluntary Safety Management System acceptance, a major step towards commercializing electric air taxis.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: 8 phishing email scams to watch out for this holiday season
item.description: Be on alert this holiday season for phishing emails. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson shares several examples of fake phishing emails he's received in his inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Landlords are using AI to raise rents; California cities are leading the pushback
item.description: California and federal prosecutors have accused software company RealPage of enriching itself ”at the expense of renters who pay inflated prices.
item.dc:creator: CalMatters, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft: TPM 2.0 is a ‘non-negotiable’ requirement for Windows 11
item.description: With Windows 10 end of support on the horizon, Microsoft said its Trusted Platform Module (TPM) 2.0 requirement for PCs is a “non-negotiable standard” for upgrading to Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024
item.description: Join host Luke McCormack as he discusses 2024 federal IT successes with top government and industry technology experts. The post Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Open-washing and the illusion of AI openness
item.description: A peculiar trend has taken hold within the AI gold rush: Major players in the space—from OpenAI to Google and Microsoft—have started to heavily market their AI models as “open.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation
